design_summary: 12-week, single-arm study of an app-guided home cardiac rehabilitation program after a recent cardiac event. Participants complete three guided exercise sessions per week with heart-rate monitoring through the study app.

criteria.probe: To begin, how old are you?

criteria.text: Heart attack, coronary stent placement, or bypass surgery between 1 and 6 months ago (events less than 1 month ago are too recent for home rehab; events more than 6 months ago fall outside the program design).
criteria.probe: What was your cardiac event - a heart attack, stent, or bypass - and when did it happen?
criteria.unknown_rule: If the participant cannot identify a qualifying event type or cannot place it, even roughly, relative to the 1-to-6-month window, INC2 is unknown.

criteria.text: Cleared for exercise by their cardiologist.
criteria.probe: Has your cardiologist cleared you for exercise?

criteria.text: Owns a smartphone and is willing to complete three guided exercise sessions per week.
criteria.probe: Do you own a smartphone, and could you complete three guided exercise sessions a week?

criteria.text: Able to walk without a walker or wheelchair.
criteria.probe: Are you able to walk without a walker or wheelchair?

criteria.text: Willing to participate for the full 12 weeks.
criteria.probe: The program runs a full 12 weeks - is that a commitment you can make?

criteria.text: Chest pain at rest, or worsening chest pain, within the past month (unstable symptoms).
criteria.probe: In the past month, have you had any chest pain at rest, or chest pain that is getting worse?

criteria.text: Told they have severe aortic stenosis (severe narrowing of a heart valve).
criteria.probe: Have you ever been told you have severe aortic stenosis, that is, a severely narrowed heart valve?

criteria.text: Currently uses supplemental oxygen at home.
criteria.probe: Do you use supplemental oxygen at home?

criteria.text: Currently enrolled in another interventional clinical trial or attending a formal cardiac rehabilitation program.
criteria.probe: Are you currently in another clinical trial, or attending a formal cardiac rehab program?
